transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Good morning. My card has been blocked and I'm currently at a checkout. I'm in a really difficult situation.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, let me bring up your account. Your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: One moment, Ms. Morse. I can see your account. I'm going to need to put you on hold briefly to check the card status.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Please be quick, I'm holding up the queue.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for holding. I can see there is a block on the card. I'm going to need to transfer you to the fraud team who can remove it.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Transfer me? I need this sorted in the next minute, I'm standing in a shop.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They should be able to help you quickly. The queue might be a few minutes. I'm transferring you now. Apologies for the inconvenience.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity before accessing account
transferred customer in urgent situation without attempting any preliminary action
did not offer callback or alternative option to customer in urgent situation
call ended without resolution; customer left in distress at checkout
